```
        - component: "div"
          props:
            class: "flex items-center justify-center h-screen bg-gray-100"
        - component: "form"
          props:
            action: "/api/auth/login"
            method: "post"
            enforce: "wasm"
            class: "bg-white p-8 rounded-lg shadow-lg w-full max-w-md"
        children:
            - component: "h2"
              props:
                text: "Faça login"
                class: "text-2xl font-semibold mb-6 text-center"
            - component: "label"
              props:
                for: "email"
                text: "E-mail"
                class: "block mb-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700"
            - component: "input"
              props:
                id: "email"
                name: "email"
                type: "email"
                required: "required"
                class: "w-full border border-gray-300 rounded px-3 py-2 mb-4 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
            - component: "label"
              props:
                for: "senha"
                text: "Senha"
                class: "block mb-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700"
            - component: "input"
              props:
                id: "senha"
                name: "senha"
                type: "password"
                required: "required"
                class: "w-full border border-gray-300 rounded px-3 py-2 mb-6 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
            - component: "button"
              props:
                type: "submit"
                text: "Entrar"
                class: "w-full bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white py-2 rounded"
""",
    'contracts/ui/dashboard.logline': """- id: "ui.dashboard"
  do:
    - type: ui.route
      path: "/dashboard"
      title: "Dashboard"
    - type: db.query
      query: |
        SELECT id, title, status, created_at
        FROM contracts
        WHERE tenant_id = "{{context.tenantId}}"
        ORDER BY created_at DESC
      target: "dashboard.contracts"
    - type: ui.render
      blocks:
        - component: "div"
          props:
            class: "p-6 bg-gray-50 min-h-screen"
        - component: "h1"
          props:
            text: "Visão Geral"
            class: "text-3xl font-semibold mb-6"
        - component: "table"
          props:
            class: "min-w-full bg-white shadow rounded-lg overflow-hidden"
            id: "contracts-table"
            hx-get: "/api/contracts/list"
            hx-trigger: "load"
            hx-swap: "outerHTML"
        - component: "thead"
          children:
            - component: "tr"
              children:
                - component: "th"
                  props:
                    text: "ID"
                    class: "px-4 py-2 border-b"
                - component: "th"
                  props:
                    text: "Título"
                    class: "px-4 py-2 border-b"
                - component: "th"
                  props:
                    text: "Status"
                    class: "px-4 py-2 border-b"
        - component: "tbody"
          children: |
            {{dashboard.contracts.map(c => `
              <tr>
                <td class="px-4 py-2 border-b">${c.id}</td>
                <td class="px-4 py-2 border-b">${c.title}</td>
                <td class="px-4 py-2 border-b">${c.status}</td>
              </tr>
            `).join("")}}
""",
    'contracts/llm/summary.logline': """- id: "llm.summary"
  do:
    - type: llm.gateway
      input:
        prompt: "{{input.texto_long}}"
        importance: "low"
      props:
        local_model: "mistral-7b"
        cloud_model: "gpt-4"
        temperature: 0.2
        fallback: true
        budget_usd: 0.005
      target: "llm.output"
    - type: ui.render
      blocks:
        - component: "label"
          props:
            text: "{{llm.output.content}}"
            class: "whitespace-pre-wrap text-base mb-4"
""",
    'contracts/infra/k8s_deploy.logline': """- id: "infra.k8s.deploy"
  do:
    - type: infra.k8s
      action: "apply"
      file: "infra/k8s/deployment.yaml"
    - type: infra.monitoring
      action: "enable"
      tool: "prometheus"
""",
    'contracts/db/query_contracts.logline': """- id: "db.query.contracts"
  do:
    - type: db.query
      query: |
        SELECT id, title, status
        FROM contracts
        WHERE tenant_id = "{{context.tenantId}}"
      target: "contracts.list"
""",
    'frontend/Cargo.toml': """[package]
name = "logline_wasm"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"

[lib]
crate-type = ["cdylib"]

[dependencies]
wasm-bindgen = "0.2"
serde = { version = "1.0", features = ["derive"] }
serde_yaml = "0.9"
js-sys = "0.3"
web-sys = { version = "0.3", features = ["Document", "HtmlElement", "Window", "Console", "Element"] }
log = "0.4"
console_error_panic_hook = "0.1"
""",
    'frontend/src/lib.rs': """use wasm_bindgen::prelude::*;
use web_sys::{Document, Element};
use serde::Deserialize;
use serde_yaml::Value as YamlValue;
use std::collections::BTreeMap;

#[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]
struct Span {
    id: Option<String>,
    #[serde(rename = "type")]
    span_type: String,
    blocks: Option<Vec<Block>>,
}

#[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]
struct Block {
    component: String,
    #[serde(default)]
    props: BTreeMap<String, YamlValue>,
    #[serde(default)]
    children: Option<Vec<YamlValue>>,
}

#[wasm_bindgen(start)]
pub fn run() {
    console_error_panic_hook::set_once();
}

#[wasm_bindgen]
pub fn render_contract(logline_text: &str) -> Result<(), JsValue> {
    let contract: Vec<Span> = serde_yaml::from_str(logline_text)
        .map_err(|e| JsValue::from_str(&format!("YAML parse error: {}", e)))?;
    let window = web_sys::window().unwrap();
    let document: Document = window.document().unwrap();
    let app_div: Element = document.get_element_by_id("app")
        .ok_or_else(|| JsValue::from_str("Elemento #app não encontrado"))?;

    app_div.set_inner_html("");

    for span in contract {
        if span.span_type == \"ui.render\" {
            if let Some(blocks) = span.blocks {
                for block in blocks {
                    let child_el = create_element_from_block(&document, &block)?;
                    app_div.append_child(&child_el)?;
                }
            }
        }
    }
    Ok(())
}

fn create_element_from_block(document: &Document, block: &Block) -> Result<Element, JsValue> {
    let tag = &block.component;
    let el = document.create_element(tag)
        .map_err(|e| JsValue::from_str(&format!(\"Falha ao criar <{}>: {:?}\", tag, e)))?;

    for (key, val) in &block.props {
        match key.as_str() {
            \"class\" => {
                if let Some(s) = val.as_str() {
                    el.set_attribute(\"class\", s)?;
                }
            }
            \"text\" => {
                if let Some(s) = val.as_str() {
                    el.set_text_content(Some(s));
                }
            }
            \"style\" => {
                if let Some(style_map) = val.as_mapping() {
                    let mut style_str = String::new();
                    for (k, v) in style_map {
                        if let (Some(ks), Some(vs)) = (k.as_str(), v.as_str()) {
                            style_str.push_str(&format!(\"{}:{};\", ks, vs));
                        }
                    }
                    el.set_attribute(\"style\", &style_str)?;
                }
            }
            \"action\" => {
                if let Some(action_name) = val.as_str() {
                    let action = action_name.to_string();
                    let closure = Closure::wrap(Box::new(move || {
                        web_sys::console::log_1(&JsValue::from_str(
                            &format!(r#\"{{\"type\":\"ui.click\",\"action\":\"{}\",\"timestamp\":\"{}\"}}\"#,
                                action,
                                js_sys::Date::new_0().to_iso_string()
                            )
                        ));
                    }) as Box<dyn FnMut()>);
                    el.add_event_listener_with_callback(\"click\", closure.as_ref().unchecked_ref())?;
                    closure.forget();
                }
            }
            \"href\" => {
                if let Some(s) = val.as_str() {
                    el.set_attribute(\"href\", s)?;
                }
            }
            _ => {
                if let Some(s) = val.as_str() {
                    el.set_attribute(key, s)?;
                }
            }
        }
    }

    Ok(el)
}
""",
    'frontend/src/helpers.rs': """// Módulo auxiliar para parsing de YAML, logs, etc.
// Outras funções podem ser adicionadas conforme necessidade.
""",
    'frontend/static/index.html': """<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>Minicontratos 2030</title>
  <link href="/static/style.css" rel="stylesheet">
</head>
<body>
  <div id="app" class="flex items-center justify-center h-screen">
    <p class="text-gray-500">Carregando interface...</p>
  </div>
  <script type="module" src="/static/wasm_glue.js"></script>
</body>
</html>
""",
    'frontend/static/style.css': """:root {
  --theme-primary: #3b82f6;
  --theme-primary-dark: #1e40af;
  --theme-surface: #f9fafb;
  --sp-1: 0.25rem;
  --sp-2: 0.5rem;
  --sp-3: 0.75rem;
  --sp-4: 1rem;
  --shadow-md: 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
}

body {
  margin: 0;
  font-family: Inter, sans-serif;
  background-color: var(--theme-surface);
}

@container (min-width: 600px) {
  .responsive-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: var(--sp-4);
  }
}
""",
    'frontend/static/wasm_glue.js': """import init, { render_contract } from "./logline_wasm.js";

export async function loadAndRender(contractPath) {
  await init();
  try {
    const resp = await fetch(contractPath);
    const text = await resp.text();
    render_contract(text);
  } catch (err) {
    document.getElementById("app").innerHTML = `<p class="text-red-600">Erro ao carregar UI: ${err}</p>`;
    console.error(err);
  }
}

window.addEventListener("load", () => {
  loadAndRender("/contracts/ui/splash.logline");
});
""",
    'frontend/build.sh': """#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -e

cd frontend
wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir static
cd ..
echo "Frontend WASM compilado com sucesso em frontend/static/"
""",
    'backend/Cargo.toml': """[package]
name = "minicontratos_backend"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"

[dependencies]
actix-web = "4"
actix-files = "0.6"
serde = { version = "1.0", features = ["derive"] }
serde_json = "1.0"
serde_yaml = "0.9"
tokio = { version = "1", features = ["macros", "rt-multi-thread"] }
sqlx = { version = "0.6", features = ["runtime-tokio-rustls", "sqlite", "macros"] }
openssl = { version = "0.10", features = ["vendored"] }
log = "0.4"
env_logger = "0.9"
reqwest = { version = "0.11", features = ["json", "rustls-tls"] }
""",
    'backend/src/main.rs': """use actix_files::Files;
use actix_web::{
    get, post,
    web::{self, Data},
    App, HttpResponse, HttpServer, Responder,
};
use std::sync::Arc;
use tokio::sync::Mutex;
use serde::Deserialize;
use sqlx::{Pool, Sqlite};
use std::time::SystemTime;

mod handlers;
mod logline_runner;
mod utils;

#[actix_web::main]
async fn main() -> std::io::Result<()> {
    env_logger::init();
    let pool = Pool::<Sqlite>::connect("sqlite://minicontratos.db").await.unwrap();
    let app_state = Data::new(AppState {
        db: Arc::new(Mutex::new(pool)),
    });

    HttpServer::new(move || {
        App::new()
            .app_data(app_state.clone())
            .service(Files::new("/static", "./frontend/static").show_files_listing())
            .service(Files::new("/contracts/ui", "./contracts/ui"))
            .service(handlers::login_page)
            .service(handlers::login_api)
            .service(handlers::contracts_list)
            .service(handlers::llm_summary)
    })
    .bind(("127.0.0.1", 8080))?
    .run()
    .await
}

pub struct AppState {
    db: Arc<Mutex<Pool<Sqlite>>>,
}
""",
    'backend/src/handlers.rs': """use actix_web::{get, post, web, HttpResponse, Responder};
use sqlx::SqlitePool;
use crate::AppState;
use serde::Deserialize;
use crate::logline_runner;
use crate::utils::record_span;

#[get("/login")]
pub async fn login_page() -> impl Responder {
    HttpResponse::Ok()
        .content_type("text/html")
        .body(include_str!("../../frontend/static/index.html"))
}

#[derive(Deserialize)]
pub struct LoginData {
    email: String,
    senha: String,
}

#[post("/api/auth/login")]
pub async fn login_api(
    data: web::Json<LoginData>,
    _state: web::Data<AppState>,
) -> impl Responder {
    record_span("auth.login", &format!("user:{}", data.email)).await;

    if data.email.contains("@") && data.senha.len() >= 6 {
        let html = r#"
        <div class="p-6 bg-green-100 rounded">
          <h2 class="text-xl font-semibold mb-4">Login bem-sucedido!</h2>
          <a href="/dashboard" class="text-blue-600 hover:underline">Ir para o dashboard</a>
        </div>
        "#;
        HttpResponse::Ok().content_type("text/html").body(html)
    } else {
        let html = r#"
        <div class="p-6 bg-red-100 rounded">
          <h2 class="text-xl font-semibold mb-4 text-red-700">Credenciais inválidas</h2>
          <a href="/login" class="text-blue-600 hover:underline">Tentar novamente</a>
        </div>
        "#;
        HttpResponse::Ok().content_type("text/html").body(html)
    }
}

#[get("/api/contracts/list")]
pub async fn contracts_list(state: web::Data<AppState>) -> impl Responder {
    let pool = state.db.lock().await;
    let rows = sqlx::query!("SELECT id, title, status FROM contracts")
        .fetch_all(&*pool)
        .await
        .unwrap_or_else(|_| vec![]);

    let mut html = String::new();
    html.push_str(r#"<table class="min-w-full bg-gray-50 shadow overflow-hidden rounded-lg">"#);
    html.push_str(r#"<thead><tr><th class="px-4 py-2 border-b">ID</th><th class="px-4 py-2 border-b">Título</th><th class="px-4 py-2 border-b">Status</th></tr></thead><tbody>"#);
    for row in rows {
        html.push_str(&format!(
            r#"<tr><td class="px-4 py-2 border-b">{}</td><td class="px-4 py-2 border-b">{}</td><td class="px-4 py-2 border-b">{}</td></tr>"#,
            row.id, row.title, row.status
        ));
    }
    html.push_str("</tbody></table>");
    HttpResponse::Ok().content_type("text/html").body(html)
}

#[derive(Deserialize)]
pub struct LlmRequest {
    prompt: String,
}

#[post("/api/llm/summary")]
pub async fn llm_summary(req: web::Json<LlmRequest>) -> impl Responder {
    let summary = logline_runner::run_llm_gateway(&req.prompt).await.unwrap_or_else(|e| e);
    HttpResponse::Ok().json(serde_json::json!({ "summary": summary }))
}
""",
    'backend/src/logline_runner.rs': """use tokio::process::Command;
use crate::utils::record_span;
use serde_json::Value;

pub async fn run_llm_gateway(prompt: &str) -> Result<String, String> {
    let output = Command::new("ollama")
        .arg("run")
        .arg("mistral")
        .arg(prompt)
        .output()
        .await
        .map_err(|e| format!("Erro LLM local: {}", e))?;

    if output.status.success() {
        let resp = String::from_utf8_lossy(&output.stdout).into_owned();
        record_span("llm.route", "mistral").await;
        record_span("llm.response", &resp).await;
        return Ok(resp);
    }
    record_span("llm.fallback", "true").await;
    let api_key = std::env::var("OPENAI_API_KEY").unwrap_or_default();
    let body = serde_json::json!({
      "model": "gpt-4",
      "messages": [{ "role": "user", "content": prompt }],
      "temperature": 0.3
    });
    let resp = reqwest::Client::new()
        .post("https://api.openai.com/v1/chat/completions")
        .bearer_auth(api_key)
        .json(&body)
        .send()
        .await
        .map_err(|e| format!("Erro OpenAI: {}", e))?;
    let data: Value = resp.json().await.map_err(|e| format!("Parse JSON falhou: {}", e))?;
    let content = data["choices"][0]["message"]["content"].as_str().unwrap_or("").to_string();
    record_span("llm.route", "gpt-4").await;
    record_span("llm.response", &content).await;
    Ok(content)
}
""",
    'backend/src/utils.rs': """use std::time::SystemTime;
use chrono::Utc;

// Grava spans em JSONL (aqui, apenas imprime para console)
pub async fn record_span(span_type: &str, message: &str) {
    let now = SystemTime::now();
    let timestamp = Utc::now().to_rfc3339();
    let span = format!(r#"{{"timestamp":"{}","type":"{}","message":"{}"}}"#, timestamp, span_type, message);
    println!("{}", span);
}
""",
    'infra/Dockerfile': """# Frontend WASM
FROM rust:1.70 as builder-frontend
WORKDIR /app/frontend
COPY ./frontend/Cargo.toml .
COPY ./frontend/src ./src
COPY ./frontend/static ./static
RUN cargo install wasm-pack && \\
    wasm-pack build --release --target web --out-dir static

# Backend Rust
FROM rust:1.70 as builder-backend
WORKDIR /app
COPY ./backend/Cargo.toml ./backend/Cargo.lock ./backend/src ./backend/src
RUN cd backend && cargo build --release

# Imagem final
FROM debian:bookworm-slim
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=builder-backend /app/backend/target/release/minicontratos_backend /usr/local/bin/minicontratos_backend
COPY --from=builder-frontend /app/frontend/static /app/static
COPY ./contracts /app/contracts
EXPOSE 8080
CMD ["/usr/local/bin/minicontratos_backend"]
""",
    'infra/k8s/deployment.yaml': """apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: minicontratos-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: minicontratos
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: minicontratos
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: minicontratos
          image: minicontratos:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
          env:
            - name: OPENAI_API_KEY
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: openai-secret
                  key: api_key
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: minicontratos-svc
spec:
  selector:
    app: minicontratos
  ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 80
      targetPort: 8080
  type: ClusterIP
"""
}

# Create directories and files
for path, content in file_structure.items():
    file_path = os.path.join(base_dir, path)
    os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(file_path), exist_ok=True)
    with open(file_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        f.write(content)

# Create ZIP archive
zip_path = '/mnt/data/minicontratos-2030.zip'
with zipfile.ZipFile(zip_path, 'w', zipfile.ZIP_DEFLATED) as zipf:
    for root, dirs, files in os.walk(base_dir):
        for file in files:
            file_full_path = os.path.join(root, file)
            arcname = os.path.relpath(file_full_path, base_dir)
            zipf.write(file_full_path, arcname)

# Provide link to the zip file
zip_path
```

Analisado

```python
import os
import zipfile

# Recreate basic scaffold structure
base_dir = '/mnt/data/minicontratos-2030'

# Define minimal scaffold files with content
file_structure = {
    'README.md': "# Minicontratos-2030\n\nScaffold para stack LogLine-WASM-Rust.\n",
    'contracts/ui/splash.logline': "- id: \"ui.splash\"\n  do:\n    - type: ui.route\n      path: \"/\"\n      title: \"Minicontratos 2030\"\n    - type: ui.render\n      blocks:\n        - component: \"div\"\n          props:\n            class: \"flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-screen bg-slate-50\"\n        - component: \"h1\"\n          props:\n            text: \"Bem-vindo ao Minicontratos 2030\"\n            class: \"text-4xl font-bold text-slate-800 mb-6\"\n        - component: \"button\"\n          props:\n            text: \"Entrar\"\n            class: \"px-6 py-3 bg-blue-600 text-white rounded hover:bg-blue-700\"\n            action: \"/login\"\n",
    'frontend/static/index.html': "<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html lang=\"pt-BR\">\n<head>\n  <meta charset=\"UTF-8\" />\n  <meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0\" />\n  <title>Minicontratos 2030</title>\n  <link href=\"/static/style.css\" rel=\"stylesheet\">\n</head>\n<body>\n  <div id=\"app\" class=\"flex items-center justify-center h-screen\">\n    <p class=\"text-gray-500\">Carregando interface...</p>\n  </div>\n  <script type=\"module\" src=\"/static/wasm_glue.js\"></script>\n</body>\n</html>\n",
    'frontend/static/style.css': ":root {\n  --theme-primary: #3b82f6;\n  --theme-surface: #f9fafb;\n}\nbody { margin: 0; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; background-color: var(--theme-surface); }\n",
    'frontend/static/wasm_glue.js': "import init, { render_contract } from \"./logline_wasm.js\";\n\nexport async function loadAndRender(contractPath) {\n  await init();\n  try {\n    const resp = await fetch(contractPath);\n    const text = await resp.text();\n    render_contract(text);\n  } catch (err) {\n    document.getElementById(\"app\").innerHTML = `<p class=\"text-red-600\">Erro ao carregar UI: ${err}</p>`;\n    console.error(err);\n  }\n}\n\nwindow.addEventListener(\"load\", () => {\n  loadAndRender(\"/contracts/ui/splash.logline\");\n});\n",
    'frontend/build.sh': "#!/usr/bin/env bash\nset -e\ncd frontend\nwasm-pack build --target web --out-dir static\ncd ..\necho \"Frontend WASM compilado com sucesso.\"\n",
    'backend/src/main.rs': "use actix_files::Files;\nuse actix_web::{get, post, web::{self, Data}, App, HttpResponse, HttpServer, Responder};\nuse std::sync::Arc;\nuse tokio::sync::Mutex;\nuse sqlx::Pool;\nuse sqlx::Sqlite;\n\nmod handlers;\nmod logline_runner;\nmod utils;\n\n#[actix_web::main]\nasync fn main() -> std::io::Result<()> {\n    env_logger::init();\n    let pool = Pool::<Sqlite>::connect(\"sqlite://minicontratos.db\").await.unwrap();\n    let app_state = Data::new(AppState { db: Arc::new(Mutex::new(pool)) });\n\n    HttpServer::new(move || {\n        App::new()\n            .app_data(app_state.clone())\n            .service(Files::new(\"/static\", \"./frontend/static\"))\n            .service(Files::new(\"/contracts/ui\", \"./contracts/ui\"))\n            .service(handlers::login_page)\n            .service(handlers::login_api)\n    })\n    .bind((\"127.0.0.1\", 8080))?\n    .run()\n    .await\n}\n\npub struct AppState { db: Arc<Mutex<Pool<Sqlite>>> }\n",
    'backend/src/handlers.rs': "use actix_web::{get, post, web, HttpResponse, Responder};\nuse crate::AppState;\n\n#[get(\"/login\")]\nasync fn login_page() -> impl Responder {\n    HttpResponse::Ok().content_type(\"text/html\").body(include_str!(\"../../frontend/static/index.html\"))\n}\n\n#[derive(serde::Deserialize)]\npub struct LoginData { email: String, senha: String }\n\n#[post(\"/api/auth/login\")]\nasync fn login_api(data: web::Json<LoginData>, _state: web::Data<AppState>) -> impl Responder {\n    if data.email.contains(\"@\") && data.senha.len() >= 6 {\n        let html = r#\"<div class=\\\"p-6 bg-green-100 rounded\\\"><h2 class=\\\"text-xl font-semibold mb-4\\\">Login bem-sucedido!</h2><a href=\\\"/dashboard\\\" class=\\\"text-blue-600 hover:underline\\\">Ir para o dashboard</a></div>\"#;\n        HttpResponse::Ok().content_type(\"text/html\").body(html)\n    } else {\n        let html = r#\"<div class=\\\"p-6 bg-red-100 rounded\\\"><h2 class=\\\"text-xl font-semibold mb-4 text-red-700\\\">Credenciais inválidas</h2><a href=\\\"/login\\\" class=\\\"text-blue-600 hover:underline\\\">Tentar novamente</a></div>\"#;\n        HttpResponse::Ok().content_type(\"text/html\").body(html)\n    }\n}\n",
    'backend/src/logline_runner.rs': "// Funções para executar spans backend (exemplo simplificado)\nuse crate::utils::record_span;\nuse tokio::process::Command;\n\npub async fn run_llm_gateway(prompt: &str) -> Result<String, String> {\n    let output = Command::new(\"echo\").arg(\"LLM response\").output().await.map_err(|e| e.to_string())?;\n    let resp = String::from_utf8_lossy(&output.stdout).into_owned();\n    record_span(\"llm.route\", &resp).await;\n    Ok(resp)\n}\n",
    'backend/src/utils.rs': "// Utilitários, por exemplo gravação de spans em JSONL (simplificado)\npub async fn record_span(span_type: &str, message: &str) {\n    println!(\"{{\\\"type\\\":\\\"{}\\\",\\\"message\\\":\\\"{}\\\"}}\", span_type, message);\n}\n",
    'backend/Cargo.toml': "[package]\nname = \"minicontratos_backend\"\nversion = \"0.1.0\"\nedition = \"2021\"\n\n[dependencies]\nactix-web = \"4\"\nactix-files = \"0.6\"\nserde = { version = \"1.0\", features = [\"derive\"] }\nserde_json = \"1.0\"\ntokio = { version = \"1\", features = [\"macros\", \"rt-multi-thread\"] }\nsqlx = { version = \"0.6\", features = [\"runtime-tokio-rustls\", \"sqlite\", \"macros\"] }\nlog = \"0.4\"\nenv_logger = \"0.9\"\nreqwest = { version = \"0.11\", features = [\"json\", \"rustls-tls\"] }\n",
    'infra/Dockerfile': "# Frontend WASM build\nFROM rust:1.70 as builder-frontend\nWORKDIR /app/frontend\nCOPY ./frontend/Cargo.toml .\nCOPY ./frontend/src ./src\nCOPY ./frontend/static ./static\nRUN cargo install wasm-pack && \\\n    wasm-pack build --release --target web --out-dir static\n\n# Backend Rust build\nFROM rust:1.70 as builder-backend\nWORKDIR /app\nCOPY ./backend/Cargo.toml ./backend/Cargo.lock ./backend/src ./backend/src\nRUN cd backend && cargo build --release\n\n# Imagem final\nFROM debian:bookworm-slim\nWORKDIR /app\nCOPY --from=builder-backend /app/backend/target/release/minicontratos_backend /usr/local/bin/minicontratos_backend\nCOPY --from=builder-frontend /app/frontend/static /app/static\nCOPY ./contracts /app/contracts\nEXPOSE 8080\nCMD [\"/usr/local/bin/minicontratos_backend\"]\n",
    'infra/k8s/deployment.yaml': "apiVersion: apps/v1\nkind: Deployment\nmetadata:\n  name: minicontratos-deployment\nspec:\n  replicas: 2\n  selector:\n    matchLabels:\n      app: minicontratos\n  template:\n    metadata:\n      labels:\n        app: minicontratos\n    spec:\n      containers:\n        - name: minicontratos\n          image: minicontratos:latest\n          ports:\n            - containerPort: 8080\n          env:\n            - name: OPENAI_API_KEY\n              valueFrom:\n                secretKeyRef:\n                  name: openai-secret\n                  key: api_key\n---\napiVersion: v1\nkind: Service\nmetadata:\n  name: minicontratos-svc\nspec:\n  selector:\n    app: minicontratos\n  ports:\n    - protocol: TCP\n      port: 80\n      targetPort: 8080\n  type: ClusterIP\n"
}

# Create directories and files
for path, content in file_structure.items():
    file_path = os.path.join(base_dir, path)
    os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(file_path), exist_ok=True)
    with open(file_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        f.write(content)

# Create ZIP archive
zip_path = '/mnt/data/minicontratos-2030.zip'
with zipfile.ZipFile(zip_path, 'w', zipfile.ZIP_DEFLATED) as zipf:
    for root, dirs, files in os.walk(base_dir):
        for file in files:
            full_path = os.path.join(root, file)
            arcname = os.path.relpath(full_path, base_dir)
            zipf.write(full_path, arcname)

zip_path
```

```python
# Base directory for scaffold

# Comprehensive scaffold content as defined earlier

    'README.md': """# Minicontratos-2030

Este repositório demonstra o scaffold mínimo para a stack "LogLine-WASM-Rust" proposta:

- UI e lógica via arquivos `.logline` em `/contracts`
- Frontend WASM em Rust em `/frontend`
- Servidor Rust em `/backend`
- Infraestrutura dos containers em `/infra`
```

```
    'contracts/ui/dashboard.logline': """- id: "ui.dashboard"
  do:
    - type: ui.route
      path: "/dashboard"
      title: "Dashboard"
    - type: db.query
      query: |
        SELECT id, title, status, created_at
        FROM contracts
        WHERE tenant_id = "{{context.tenantId}}"
        ORDER BY created_at DESC
      target: "dashboard.contracts"
    - type: ui.render

    'frontend/Cargo.toml': """[package]
name = "logline_wasm"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"

[lib]
crate-type = ["cdylib"]

[dependencies]
wasm-bindgen = "0.2"
serde = { version = "1.0", features = ["derive"] }
serde_yaml = "0.9"
js-sys = "0.3"
web-sys = { version = "0.3", features = ["Document", "HtmlElement", "Window", "Console", "Element"] }
log = "0.4"
console_error_panic_hook = "0.1"
""",
    'frontend/src/lib.rs': """use wasm_bindgen::prelude::*;
use web_sys::{Document, Element};
use serde::Deserialize;
use serde_yaml::Value as YamlValue;
use std::collections::BTreeMap;

#[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]
struct Span {
    id: Option<String>,
    #[serde(rename = "type")]
    span_type: String,
    blocks: Option<Vec<Block>>,
}

#[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]
struct Block {
    component: String,
    #[serde(default)]
    props: BTreeMap<String, YamlValue>,
    #[serde(default)]
    children: Option<Vec<YamlValue>>,
}

#[wasm_bindgen(start)]
pub fn run() {
    console_error_panic_hook::set_once();
}

#[wasm_bindgen]
pub fn render_contract(logline_text: &str) -> Result<(), JsValue> {
    let contract: Vec<Span> = serde_yaml::from_str(logline_text)
        .map_err(|e| JsValue::from_str(&format!("YAML parse error: {}", e)))?;
    let window = web_sys::window().unwrap();
    let document: Document = window.document().unwrap();
    let app_div: Element = document.get_element_by_id("app")
        .ok_or_else(|| JsValue::from_str("Elemento #app não encontrado"))?;

    app_div.set_inner_html("");

    for span in contract {
        if span.span_type == "ui.render" {
            if let Some(blocks) = span.blocks {
                for block in blocks {
                    let child_el = create_element_from_block(&document, &block)?;
                    app_div.append_child(&child_el)?;
                }
            }
        }
    }
    Ok(())
}

fn create_element_from_block(document: &Document, block: &Block) -> Result<Element, JsValue> {
    let tag = &block.component;
    let el = document.create_element(tag)
        .map_err(|e| JsValue::from_str(&format!("Falha ao criar <{}>: {:?}", tag, e)))?;

    for (key, val) in &block.props {
        match key.as_str() {
            "class" => {
                if let Some(s) = val.as_str() {
                    el.set_attribute("class", s)?;
                }
            }
            "text" => {
                if let Some(s) = val.as_str() {
                    el.set_text_content(Some(s));
                }
            }
            "style" => {
                if let Some(style_map) = val.as_mapping() {
                    let mut style_str = String::new();
                    for (k, v) in style_map {
                        if let (Some(ks), Some(vs)) = (k.as_str(), v.as_str()) {
                            style_str.push_str(&format!("{}:{};", ks, vs));
                        }
                    }
                    el.set_attribute("style", &style_str)?;
                }
            }
            "action" => {
                if let Some(action_name) = val.as_str() {
                    let action = action_name.to_string();
                    let closure = Closure::wrap(Box::new(move || {
                        web_sys::console::log_1(&JsValue::from_str(
                            &format!(r#"{{"type":"ui.click","action":"{}","timestamp":"{}"}}"#,
                                action,
                                js_sys::Date::new_0().to_iso_string()
                            )
                        ));
                    }) as Box<dyn FnMut()>);
                    el.add_event_listener_with_callback("click", closure.as_ref().unchecked_ref())?;
                    closure.forget();
                }
            }
            "href" => {
                if let Some(s) = val.as_str() {
                    el.set_attribute("href", s)?;
                }
            }
            _ => {
                if let Some(s) = val.as_str() {
                    el.set_attribute(key, s)?;
                }
            }
        }
    }

    Ok(el)
}
""",
    'frontend/src/helpers.rs': """// Placeholder para funções auxiliares futuras.
""",
    'frontend/static/index.html': """<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>Minicontratos 2030</title>
  <link href="/static/style.css" rel="stylesheet">
</head>
<body>
  <div id="app" class="flex items-center justify-center h-screen">
    <p class="text-gray-500">Carregando interface...</p>
  </div>
  <script type="module" src="/static/wasm_glue.js"></script>
</body>
</html>
""",
    'frontend/static/style.css': """:root {
  --theme-primary: #3b82f6;
  --theme-surface: #f9fafb;
}

body {
  margin: 0;
  font-family: Inter, sans-serif;
  background-color: var(--theme-surface);
}
""",
    'frontend/static/wasm_glue.js': """import init, { render_contract } from "./logline_wasm.js";

export async function loadAndRender(contractPath) {
  await init();
  try {
    const resp = await fetch(contractPath);
    const text = await resp.text();
    render_contract(text);
  } catch (err) {
    document.getElementById("app").innerHTML = `<p class="text-red-600">Erro ao carregar UI: ${err}</p>`;
    console.error(err);
  }
}

window.addEventListener("load", () => {
  loadAndRender("/contracts/ui/splash.logline");
});
""",
    'frontend/build.sh': """#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -e

cd frontend
wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir static
cd ..
echo "Frontend WASM compilado com sucesso em frontend/static/"
""",
    'backend/Cargo.toml': """[package]
name = "minicontratos_backend"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"

[dependencies]
actix-web = "4"
actix-files = "0.6"
serde = { version = "1.0", features = ["derive"] }
serde_json = "1.0"
serde_yaml = "0.9"
tokio = { version = "1", features = ["macros", "rt-multi-thread"] }
sqlx = { version = "0.6", features = ["runtime-tokio-rustls", "sqlite", "macros"] }
log = "0.4"
env_logger = "0.9"
reqwest = { version = "0.11", features = ["json", "rustls-tls"] }
""",
    'backend/src/main.rs': """use actix_files::Files;
use actix_web::{
    get, post,
    web::{self, Data},
    App, HttpResponse, HttpServer, Responder,
};
use std::sync::Arc;
use tokio::sync::Mutex;
use sqlx::Pool;
use sqlx::Sqlite;

mod handlers;
mod logline_runner;
mod utils;

#[actix_web::main]
async fn main() -> std::io::Result<()> {
    env_logger::init();
    let pool = Pool::<Sqlite>::connect("sqlite://minicontratos.db").await.unwrap();
    let app_state = Data::new(AppState { db: Arc::new(Mutex::new(pool)) });

    HttpServer::new(move || {
        App::new()
            .app_data(app_state.clone())
            .service(Files::new("/static", "./frontend/static").show_files_listing())
            .service(Files::new("/contracts/ui", "./contracts/ui"))
            .service(handlers::login_page)
            .service(handlers::login_api)
            .service(handlers::contracts_list)
            .service(handlers::llm_summary)
    })
    .bind(("127.0.0.1", 8080))?
    .run()
    .await
}

pub struct AppState {
    db: Arc<Mutex<Pool<Sqlite>>>,
}
""",
    'backend/src/handlers.rs': """use actix_web::{get, post, web, HttpResponse, Responder};
use crate::AppState;
use serde::Deserialize;
use crate::logline_runner;
use crate::utils::record_span;

#[get("/login")]
pub async fn login_page() -> impl Responder {
    HttpResponse::Ok().content_type("text/html").body(include_str!("../../frontend/static/index.html"))
}

#[derive(Deserialize)]
pub struct LoginData {
    email: String,
    senha: String,
}

#[post("/api/auth/login")]
pub async fn login_api(
    data: web::Json<LoginData>,
    _state: web::Data<AppState>,
) -> impl Responder {
    record_span("auth.login", &format!("user:{}", data.email)).await;

    if data.email.contains("@") && data.senha.len() >= 6 {
        let html = r#"
        <div class="p-6 bg-green-100 rounded"><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold mb-4">Login bem-sucedido!</h2><a href="/dashboard" class="text-blue-600 hover:underline">Ir para o dashboard</a></div>
        "#;
        HttpResponse::Ok().content_type("text/html").body(html)
    } else {
        let html = r#"
        <div class="p-6 bg-red-100 rounded"><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold mb-4 text-red-700">Credenciais inválidas</h2><a href="/login" class="text-blue-600 hover:underline">Tentar novamente</a></div>
        "#;
        HttpResponse::Ok().content_type("text/html").body(html)
    }
}

#[get("/api/contracts/list")]
pub async fn contracts_list(state: web::Data<AppState>) -> impl Responder {
    let pool = state.db.lock().await;
    let rows = sqlx::query!("SELECT id, title, status FROM contracts").fetch_all(&*pool).await.unwrap_or_else(|_| vec![]);

    let mut html = String::new();
    html.push_str(r#"<table class="min-w-full bg-gray-50 shadow overflow-hidden rounded-lg"><thead><tr><th class="px-4 py-2 border-b">ID</th><th class="px-4 py-2 border-b">Título</th><th class="px-4 py-2 border-b">Status</th></tr></thead><tbody>"#);
    for row in rows {
        html.push_str(&format!(r#"<tr><td class="px-4 py-2 border-b">{}</td><td class="px-4 py-2 border-b">{}</td><td class="px-4 py-2 border-b">{}</td></tr>"#, row.id, row.title, row.status));
    }
    html.push_str("</tbody></table>");
    HttpResponse::Ok().content_type("text/html").body(html)
}

#[derive(Deserialize)]
pub struct LlmRequest {
    prompt: String,
}

#[post("/api/llm/summary")]
pub async fn llm_summary(req: web::Json<LlmRequest>) -> impl Responder {
    let summary = logline_runner::run_llm_gateway(&req.prompt).await.unwrap_or_else(|e| e);
    HttpResponse::Ok().json(serde_json::json!({ "summary": summary }))
}
""",
    'backend/src/logline_runner.rs': """use tokio::process::Command;
use crate::utils::record_span;

pub async fn run_llm_gateway(prompt: &str) -> Result<String, String> {
    let output = Command::new("echo").arg("LLM response").output().await.map_err(|e| e.to_string())?;
    let resp = String::from_utf8_lossy(&output.stdout).into_owned();
    record_span("llm.route", &resp).await;
    Ok(resp)
}
""",
    'backend/src/utils.rs': """pub async fn record_span(span_type: &str, message: &str) {
    println!("{{\"type\":\"{}\",\"message\":\"{}\"}}", span_type, message);
}
""",
    'backend/Cargo.toml': """[package]
name = "minicontratos_backend"

[dependencies]

serde_json = "1.0"
serde_yaml = "0.9"
tokio = { version = "1", features = ["macros", "rt-multi-thread"] }

    'infra/Dockerfile': """# Frontend WASM build
FROM rust:1.70 as builder-frontend
WORKDIR /app/frontend
COPY ./frontend/Cargo.toml . 
COPY ./frontend/src ./src
COPY ./frontend/static ./static
RUN cargo install wasm-pack && \\
    wasm-pack build --release --target web --out-dir static

# Backend Rust build
FROM rust:1.70 as builder-backend
WORKDIR /app
COPY ./backend/Cargo.toml ./backend/Cargo.lock ./backend/src ./backend/src
RUN cd backend && cargo build --release

# Image final
FROM debian:bookworm-slim
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=builder-backend /app/backend/target/release/minicontratos_backend /usr/local/bin/minicontratos_backend
COPY --from=builder-frontend /app/frontend/static /app/static
COPY ./contracts /app/contracts
EXPOSE 8080
CMD ["/usr/local/bin/minicontratos_backend"]
""",
    'infra/k8s/deployment.yaml': """apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: minicontratos-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: minicontratos
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: minicontratos
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: minicontratos

          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
          env:
            - name: OPENAI_API_KEY
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: openai-secret
                  key: api_key
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: minicontratos-svc
spec:
  selector:
    app: minicontratos
  ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 80
      targetPort: 8080
  type: ClusterIP
"""
}

# Create directories and files

    file_path = os.path.join(base_dir, path)
    os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(file_path), exist_ok=True)
    with open(file_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        f.write(content)

# Create ZIP archive
zip_path = '/mnt/data/minicontratos-2030-full.zip'
with zipfile.ZipFile(zip_path, 'w', zipfile.ZIP_DEFLATED) as zipf:
    for root, dirs, files in os.walk(base_dir):
        for file in files:
            full_path = os.path.join(root, file)
            arcname = os.path.relpath(full_path, base_dir)
            zipf.write(full_path, arcname)

zip_path
```

```python
Este repositório demonstra o scaffold mínimo para a stack **LogLine-WASM-Rust**, conforme conversamos:
```

```
  do:

      path: "/dashboard"

    - type: ui.render

        - component: "h1"

    # Frontend
    'frontend/Cargo.toml': """[package]
name = "logline_wasm"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"

[lib]
crate-type = ["cdylib"]

[dependencies]
wasm-bindgen = "0.2"
serde = { version = "1.0", features = ["derive"] }
serde_yaml = "0.9"
js-sys = "0.3"
web-sys = { version = "0.3", features = ["Document", "HtmlElement", "Window", "Console", "Element"] }
log = "0.4"
console_error_panic_hook = "0.1"
""",
    'frontend/src/lib.rs': """use wasm_bindgen::prelude::*;
use web_sys::{Document, Element};
use serde::Deserialize;
use serde_yaml::Value as YamlValue;
use std::collections::BTreeMap;

#[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]
struct Span {
    id: Option<String>,
    #[serde(rename = "type")]
    span_type: String,
    blocks: Option<Vec<Block>>,
}

#[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]
struct Block {
    component: String,
    #[serde(default)]
    props: BTreeMap<String, YamlValue>,
    #[serde(default)]
    children: Option<Vec<YamlValue>>,
}

#[wasm_bindgen(start)]
pub fn run() {
    console_error_panic_hook::set_once();
}

#[wasm_bindgen]
pub fn render_contract(logline_text: &str) -> Result<(), JsValue> {
    let contract: Vec<Span> = serde_yaml::from_str(logline_text)
        .map_err(|e| JsValue::from_str(&format!("YAML parse error: {}", e)))?;
    let window = web_sys::window().unwrap();
    let document: Document = window.document().unwrap();
    let app_div: Element = document.get_element_by_id("app")
        .ok_or_else(|| JsValue::from_str("Elemento #app não encontrado"))?;

    app_div.set_inner_html("");

    for span in contract {
        if span.span_type == "ui.render" {
            if let Some(blocks) = span.blocks {
                for block in blocks {
                    let child_el = create_element_from_block(&document, &block)?;
                    app_div.append_child(&child_el)?;
                }
            }
        }
    }
    Ok(())
}

fn create_element_from_block(document: &Document, block: &Block) -> Result<Element, JsValue> {
    let tag = &block.component;
    let el = document.create_element(tag)
        .map_err(|e| JsValue::from_str(&format!("Falha ao criar <{}>: {:?}", tag, e)))?;

    for (key, val) in &block.props {
        match key.as_str() {
            "class" => {
                if let Some(s) = val.as_str() {
                    el.set_attribute("class", s)?;
                }
            }
            "text" => {
                if let Some(s) = val.as_str() {
                    el.set_text_content(Some(s));
                }
            }
            "style" => {
                if let Some(style_map) = val.as_mapping() {
                    let mut style_str = String::new();
                    for (k, v) in style_map {
                        if let (Some(ks), Some(vs)) = (k.as_str(), v.as_str()) {
                            style_str.push_str(&format!("{}:{};", ks, vs));
                        }
                    }
                    el.set_attribute("style", &style_str)?;
                }
            }
            "action" => {
                if let Some(action_name) = val.as_str() {
                    let action = action_name.to_string();
                    let closure = Closure::wrap(Box::new(move || {
                        web_sys::console::log_1(&JsValue::from_str(
                            &format!(r#"{{"type":"ui.click","action":"{}","timestamp":"{}"}}"#,
                                action,
                                js_sys::Date::new_0().to_iso_string()
                            )
                        ));
                    }) as Box<dyn FnMut()>);
                    el.add_event_listener_with_callback("click", closure.as_ref().unchecked_ref())?;
                    closure.forget();
                }
            }
            "href" => {
                if let Some(s) = val.as_str() {
                    el.set_attribute("href", s)?;
                }
            }
            _ => {
                if let Some(s) = val.as_str() {
                    el.set_attribute(key, s)?;
                }
            }
        }
    }

    Ok(el)
}
""",
    'frontend/src/helpers.rs': """// Helpers para parse de YAML, logs, etc.
// Adicione funções conforme necessário.
""",
    'frontend/static/index.html': """<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>Minicontratos 2030</title>
  <link href="/static/style.css" rel="stylesheet">
</head>
<body>
  <div id="app" class="flex items-center justify-center h-screen">
    <p class="text-gray-500">Carregando interface...</p>
  </div>
  <script type="module" src="/static/wasm_glue.js"></script>
</body>
</html>
""",
    'frontend/static/style.css': """:root {
  --theme-primary: #3b82f6;
  --theme-surface: #f9fafb;
  --sp-1: 0.25rem;
  --sp-2: 0.5rem;
  --sp-3: 0.75rem;
  --sp-4: 1rem;
  --shadow-md: 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
}

body {
  margin: 0;
  font-family: Inter, sans-serif;
  background-color: var(--theme-surface);
}

@container (min-width: 600px) {
  .responsive-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: var(--sp-4);
  }
}
""",
    'frontend/static/wasm_glue.js': """import init, { render_contract } from "./logline_wasm.js";

export async function loadAndRender(contractPath) {
  await init();
  try {
    const resp = await fetch(contractPath);
    const text = await resp.text();
    render_contract(text);
  } catch (err) {
    document.getElementById("app").innerHTML = `<p class="text-red-600">Erro ao carregar UI: ${err}</p>`;
    console.error(err);
  }
}

window.addEventListener("load", () => {
  loadAndRender("/contracts/ui/splash.logline");
});
""",
    'frontend/build.sh': """#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -e
cd frontend
wasm-pack build --release --target web --out-dir static
cd ..
echo "Frontend WASM compilado com sucesso."
""",
    # Backend
    'backend/Cargo.toml': """[package]
name = "minicontratos_backend"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"

[dependencies]
actix-web = "4"
actix-files = "0.6"
serde = { version = "1.0", features = ["derive"] }
serde_json = "1.0"
serde_yaml = "0.9"
tokio = { version = "1", features = ["macros", "rt-multi-thread"] }
sqlx = { version = "0.6", features = ["runtime-tokio-rustls", "sqlite", "macros"] }
log = "0.4"
env_logger = "0.9"
reqwest = { version = "0.11", features = ["json", "rustls-tls"] }
chrono = "0.4"
""",
    'backend/src/main.rs': """use actix_files::Files;
use actix_web::{
    get, post,
    web::{self, Data},
    App, HttpResponse, HttpServer, Responder,
};
use std::sync::Arc;
use tokio::sync::Mutex;
use serde::Deserialize;
use sqlx::{Pool, Sqlite};

mod handlers;
mod logline_runner;
mod utils;

#[derive(Clone)]
pub struct AppState {
    pub db: Arc<Mutex<Pool<Sqlite>>>,
}

#[actix_web::main]
async fn main() -> std::io::Result<()> {
    env_logger::init();
    let pool = Pool::<Sqlite>::connect("sqlite://minicontratos.db").await.unwrap();
    let state = AppState {
        db: Arc::new(Mutex::new(pool)),
    };

    HttpServer::new(move || {
        App::new()
            .app_data(Data::new(state.clone()))
            .service(Files::new("/static", "./frontend/static").show_files_listing())
            .service(Files::new("/contracts/ui", "./contracts/ui"))
            .service(handlers::login_page)
            .service(handlers::login_api)
            .service(handlers::contracts_list)
            .service(handlers::llm_summary)
    })
    .bind(("127.0.0.1", 8080))?
    .run()
    .await
}
""",
    'backend/src/handlers.rs': """use actix_web::{get, post, web, HttpResponse, Responder};
use crate::AppState;
use serde::Deserialize;
use crate::logline_runner;
use crate::utils::record_span;

#[get("/login")]
pub async fn login_page() -> impl Responder {
    HttpResponse::Ok().content_type("text/html").body(include_str!("../../frontend/static/index.html"))
}

#[derive(Deserialize)]
pub struct LoginData {
    pub email: String,
    pub senha: String,
}

#[post("/api/auth/login")]
pub async fn login_api(
    data: web::Json<LoginData>,
    _state: web::Data<AppState>,
) -> impl Responder {
    record_span("auth.login", &format!("user:{}", data.email)).await;

    if data.email.contains("@") && data.senha.len() >= 6 {
        let html = r#"
        <div class="p-6 bg-green-100 rounded">
          <h2 class="text-xl font-semibold mb-4">Login bem-sucedido!</h2>
          <a href="/dashboard" class="text-blue-600 hover:underline">Ir para o dashboard</a>
        </div>
        "#;
        HttpResponse::Ok().content_type("text/html").body(html)
    } else {
        let html = r#"
        <div class="p-6 bg-red-100 rounded">
          <h2 class="text-xl font-semibold mb-4 text-red-700">Credenciais inválidas</h2>
          <a href="/login" class="text-blue-600 hover:underline">Tentar novamente</a>
        </div>
        "#;
        HttpResponse::Ok().content_type("text/html").body(html)
    }
}

#[get("/api/contracts/list")]
pub async fn contracts_list(state: web::Data<AppState>) -> impl Responder {
    let pool = state.db.lock().await;
    let rows = sqlx::query!("SELECT id, title, status FROM contracts")
        .fetch_all(&*pool)
        .await
        .unwrap_or_else(|_| vec![]);

    let mut html = String::new();
    html.push_str(r#"<table class="min-w-full bg-gray-50 shadow overflow-hidden rounded-lg">"#);
    html.push_str(r#"<thead><tr><th class="px-4 py-2 border-b">ID</th><th class="px-4 py-2 border-b">Título</th><th class="px-4 py-2 border-b">Status</th></tr></thead><tbody>"#);
    for row in rows {
        html.push_str(&format!(
            r#"<tr><td class="px-4 py-2 border-b">{}</td><td class="px-4 py-2 border-b">{}</td><td class="px-4 py-2 border-b">{}</td></tr>"#,
            row.id, row.title, row.status
        ));
    }
    html.push_str("</tbody></table>");
    HttpResponse::Ok().content_type("text/html").body(html)
}

#[derive(Deserialize)]
pub struct LlmRequest {
    pub prompt: String,
}

#[post("/api/llm/summary")]
pub async fn llm_summary(req: web::Json<LlmRequest>) -> impl Responder {
    let summary = logline_runner::run_llm_gateway(&req.prompt).await.unwrap_or_else(|e| e);
    HttpResponse::Ok().json(serde_json::json!({ "summary": summary }))
}
""",
    'backend/src/logline_runner.rs': """use tokio::process::Command;
use crate::utils::record_span;

pub async fn run_llm_gateway(prompt: &str) -> Result<String, String> {
    let output = Command::new("echo").arg("LLM response").output().await.map_err(|e| e.to_string())?;
    let resp = String::from_utf8_lossy(&output.stdout).into_owned();
    record_span("llm.route", &resp).await;
    Ok(resp)
}
""",
    'backend/src/utils.rs': """use chrono::Utc;

// Grava spans em JSONL (simplificado: imprime no console)
pub async fn record_span(span_type: &str, message: &str) {
    let timestamp = Utc::now().to_rfc3339();
    let span = format!(r#"{{"timestamp":"{}","type":"{}","message":"{}"}}"#, timestamp, span_type, message);
    println!("{}", span);
}
""",
    'infra/Dockerfile': """# Frontend WASM build
FROM rust:1.70 as builder-frontend
WORKDIR /app/frontend
COPY ./frontend/Cargo.toml .
COPY ./frontend/src ./src
COPY ./frontend/static ./static
RUN cargo install wasm-pack && \\
    wasm-pack build --release --target web --out-dir static

# Backend Rust build
FROM rust:1.70 as builder-backend
WORKDIR /app
COPY ./backend/Cargo.toml ./backend/Cargo.lock ./backend/src ./backend/src
RUN cd backend && cargo build --release

# Final image
FROM debian:bookworm-slim
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=builder-backend /app/backend/target/release/minicontratos_backend /usr/local/bin/minicontratos_backend
COPY --from=builder-frontend /app/frontend/static /app/static
COPY ./contracts /app/contracts
EXPOSE 8080
CMD ["/usr/local/bin/minicontratos_backend"]
""",
    'infra/k8s/deployment.yaml': """apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: minicontratos-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: minicontratos
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: minicontratos
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: minicontratos
          image: minicontratos:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
          env:
            - name: OPENAI_API_KEY
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: openai-secret
                  key: api_key
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: minicontratos-svc
spec:
  selector:
    app: minicontratos
  ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 80
      targetPort: 8080
  type: ClusterIP
"""
}

# Create directories and files
for path, content in file_structure.items():
    file_path = os.path.join(base_dir, path)
    os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(file_path), exist_ok=True)
    with open(file_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        f.write(content)

# Create ZIP archive
zip_path = '/mnt/data/minicontratos-2030-full.zip'
with zipfile.ZipFile(zip_path, 'w', zipfile.ZIP_DEFLATED) as zipf:
    for root, dirs, files in os.walk(base_dir):
        for file in files:
            full_path = os.path.join(root, file)
            arcname = os.path.relpath(full_path, base_dir)
            zipf.write(full_path, arcname)

zip_path
```

### 1\. `README.md`

```markdown
# Minicontratos-2030

Este repositório demonstra o scaffold mínimo para a stack **LogLine-WASM-Rust**, conforme conversamos:

- UI e lógica via arquivos `.logline` em `/contracts`
- Frontend WASM em Rust em `/frontend`
- Servidor Rust em `/backend`
- Infraestrutura dos containers em `/infra`

## Estrutura de Pastas

```

minicontratos-2030/  
├── contracts/  
│ ├── ui/  
│ │ ├── splash.logline  
│ │ ├── login.logline  
│ │ └── dashboard.logline  
│ ├── llm/  
│ │ └── summary.logline  
│ ├── infra/  
│ │ └── k8s\_deploy.logline  
│ └── db/  
│ └── query\_contracts.logline  
├── frontend/  
│ ├── Cargo.toml  
│ ├── src/  
│ │ ├── lib.rs  
│ │ └── helpers.rs  
│ ├── static/  
│ │ ├── index.html  
│ │ ├── style.css  
│ │ └── wasm\_glue.js  
│ └── build.sh  
├── backend/  
│ ├── Cargo.toml  
│ ├── src/  
│ │ ├── main.rs  
│ │ ├── handlers.rs  
│ │ ├── logline\_runner.rs  
│ │ └── utils.rs  
├── infra/  
│ ├── Dockerfile  
│ └── k8s/  
│ └── deployment.yaml

````
    - type: ui.route

        - component: "div"
````

```yaml
        - component: "form"
          props:

            method: "post"
            enforce: "wasm"
            class: "bg-white p-8 rounded-lg shadow-lg w-full max-w-md"

              props:

            - component: "button"
```

### 2.3. `contracts/ui/dashboard.logline`

```yaml
- id: "ui.dashboard"
  do:
    - type: ui.route
      path: "/dashboard"
      title: "Dashboard"
    - type: db.query
      query: |
        SELECT id, title, status, created_at
        FROM contracts
        WHERE tenant_id = "{{context.tenantId}}"
        ORDER BY created_at DESC
      target: "dashboard.contracts"
    - type: ui.render
      blocks:
        - component: "div"
          props:
            class: "p-6 bg-gray-50 min-h-screen"
        - component: "h1"
          props:
            text: "Visão Geral"
            class: "text-3xl font-semibold mb-6"
        - component: "table"
          props:
            class: "min-w-full bg-white shadow rounded-lg overflow-hidden"
            id: "contracts-table"
            hx-get: "/api/contracts/list"
            hx-trigger: "load"
            hx-swap: "outerHTML"
        - component: "thead"
          children:
            - component: "tr"
              children:
                - component: "th"
                  props:
                    text: "ID"
                    class: "px-4 py-2 border-b"
                - component: "th"
                  props:
                    text: "Título"
                    class: "px-4 py-2 border-b"
                - component: "th"
                  props:
                    text: "Status"
                    class: "px-4 py-2 border-b"
        - component: "tbody"
          children: |
            {{dashboard.contracts.map(c => `
              <tr>
                <td class="px-4 py-2 border-b">${c.id}</td>
                <td class="px-4 py-2 border-b">${c.title}</td>
                <td class="px-4 py-2 border-b">${c.status}</td>
              </tr>
            `).join("")}}
```

```yaml
- id: "llm.summary"

        prompt: "{{input.texto_long}}"
        importance: "low"
      props:
        local_model: "mistral-7b"
        cloud_model: "gpt-4"
        temperature: 0.2
        fallback: true
        budget_usd: 0.005
      target: "llm.output"

            class: "whitespace-pre-wrap text-base mb-4"
```

3\. `frontend/`
---------------

### 3.1. `frontend/Cargo.toml`

```toml
[package]
name = "logline_wasm"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"

[lib]
crate-type = ["cdylib"]

[dependencies]
wasm-bindgen = "0.2"
serde = { version = "1.0", features = ["derive"] }
serde_yaml = "0.9"
js-sys = "0.3"
web-sys = { version = "0.3", features = ["Document", "HtmlElement", "Window", "Console", "Element"] }
log = "0.4"
console_error_panic_hook = "0.1"
```

### 3.2. `frontend/src/lib.rs`

```rust
use wasm_bindgen::prelude::*;
use web_sys::{Document, Element};
use serde::Deserialize;
use serde_yaml::Value as YamlValue;
use std::collections::BTreeMap;

#[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]
struct Span {
    id: Option<String>,
    #[serde(rename = "type")]
    span_type: String,
    blocks: Option<Vec<Block>>,
}

#[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]
struct Block {
    component: String,
    #[serde(default)]
    props: BTreeMap<String, YamlValue>,
    #[serde(default)]
    children: Option<Vec<YamlValue>>,
}

#[wasm_bindgen(start)]
pub fn run() {
    console_error_panic_hook::set_once();
}

#[wasm_bindgen]
pub fn render_contract(logline_text: &str) -> Result<(), JsValue> {
    let contract: Vec<Span> = serde_yaml::from_str(logline_text)
        .map_err(|e| JsValue::from_str(&format!("YAML parse error: {}", e)))?;
    let window = web_sys::window().unwrap();
    let document: Document = window.document().unwrap();
    let app_div: Element = document.get_element_by_id("app")
        .ok_or_else(|| JsValue::from_str("Elemento #app não encontrado"))?;

    app_div.set_inner_html("");

    for span in contract {
        if span.span_type == "ui.render" {
            if let Some(blocks) = span.blocks {
                for block in blocks {
                    let child_el = create_element_from_block(&document, &block)?;
                    app_div.append_child(&child_el)?;
                }
            }
        }
    }
    Ok(())
}

fn create_element_from_block(document: &Document, block: &Block) -> Result<Element, JsValue> {
    let tag = &block.component;
    let el = document.create_element(tag)
        .map_err(|e| JsValue::from_str(&format!("Falha ao criar <{}>: {:?}", tag, e)))?;

    for (key, val) in &block.props {
        match key.as_str() {
            "class" => {
                if let Some(s) = val.as_str() {
                    el.set_attribute("class", s)?;
                }
            }
            "text" => {
                if let Some(s) = val.as_str() {
                    el.set_text_content(Some(s));
                }
            }
            "style" => {
                if let Some(style_map) = val.as_mapping() {
                    let mut style_str = String::new();
                    for (k, v) in style_map {
                        if let (Some(ks), Some(vs)) = (k.as_str(), v.as_str()) {
                            style_str.push_str(&format!("{}:{};", ks, vs));
                        }
                    }
                    el.set_attribute("style", &style_str)?;
                }
            }
            "action" => {
                if let Some(action_name) = val.as_str() {
                    let action = action_name.to_string();
                    let closure = Closure::wrap(Box::new(move || {
                        web_sys::console::log_1(&JsValue::from_str(
                            &format!(r#"{{"type":"ui.click","action":"{}","timestamp":"{}"}}"#,
                                action,
                                js_sys::Date::new_0().to_iso_string()
                            )
                        ));
                    }) as Box<dyn FnMut()>);
                    el.add_event_listener_with_callback("click", closure.as_ref().unchecked_ref())?;
                    closure.forget();
                }
            }
            "href" => {
                if let Some(s) = val.as_str() {
                    el.set_attribute("href", s)?;
                }
            }
            _ => {
                if let Some(s) = val.as_str() {
                    el.set_attribute(key, s)?;
                }
            }
        }
    }

    Ok(el)
}
```

```css
:root {
  --theme-primary: #3b82f6;
  --theme-surface: #f9fafb;
  --sp-1: 0.25rem;
  --sp-2: 0.5rem;
  --sp-3: 0.75rem;

  --shadow-md: 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);

  background-color: var(--theme-surface);
```

### 3.6. `frontend/static/wasm_glue.js`

```js
import init, { render_contract } from "./logline_wasm.js";

export async function loadAndRender(contractPath) {
  await init();
  try {
    const resp = await fetch(contractPath);
    const text = await resp.text();
    render_contract(text);
  } catch (err) {
    document.getElementById("app").innerHTML = `<p class="text-red-600">Erro ao carregar UI: ${err}</p>`;
    console.error(err);
  }
}

window.addEventListener("load", () => {
  loadAndRender("/contracts/ui/splash.logline");
});
```

### 3.7. `frontend/build.sh`

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -e

cd frontend
wasm-pack build --release --target web --out-dir static
cd ..
echo "Frontend WASM compilado com sucesso."
```

4\. `backend/`
--------------

### 4.1. `backend/Cargo.toml`

```toml
[package]
name = "minicontratos_backend"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"

[dependencies]
actix-web = "4"
actix-files = "0.6"
serde = { version = "1.0", features = ["derive"] }
serde_json = "1.0"
serde_yaml = "0.9"
tokio = { version = "1", features = ["macros", "rt-multi-thread"] }
sqlx = { version = "0.6", features = ["runtime-tokio-rustls", "sqlite", "macros"] }
log = "0.4"
env_logger = "0.9"
reqwest = { version = "0.11", features = ["json", "rustls-tls"] }
chrono = "0.4"
```

### 4.2. `backend/src/main.rs`

```rust
use actix_files::Files;
use actix_web::{
    get, post,
    web::{self, Data},
    App, HttpResponse, HttpServer, Responder,
};
use std::sync::Arc;
use tokio::sync::Mutex;
use serde::Deserialize;
use sqlx::{Pool, Sqlite};

mod handlers;
mod logline_runner;
mod utils;

#[derive(Clone)]
pub struct AppState {
    pub db: Arc<Mutex<Pool<Sqlite>>>,
}

#[actix_web::main]
async fn main() -> std::io::Result<()> {
    env_logger::init();
    let pool = Pool::<Sqlite>::connect("sqlite://minicontratos.db").await.unwrap();
    let state = AppState {
        db: Arc::new(Mutex::new(pool)),
    };

    HttpServer::new(move || {
        App::new()
            .app_data(Data::new(state.clone()))
            .service(Files::new("/static", "./frontend/static").show_files_listing())
            .service(Files::new("/contracts/ui", "./contracts/ui"))
            .service(handlers::login_page)
            .service(handlers::login_api)
            .service(handlers::contracts_list)
            .service(handlers::llm_summary)
    })
    .bind(("127.0.0.1", 8080))?
    .run()
    .await
}
```

### 4.3. `backend/src/handlers.rs`

```rust
use actix_web::{get, post, web, HttpResponse, Responder};
use crate::AppState;
use serde::Deserialize;
use crate::logline_runner;
use crate::utils::record_span;

#[get("/login")]
pub async fn login_page() -> impl Responder {
    HttpResponse::Ok().content_type("text/html").body(include_str!("../../frontend/static/index.html"))
}

#[derive(Deserialize)]
pub struct LoginData {
    pub email: String,
    pub senha: String,
}

#[post("/api/auth/login")]
pub async fn login_api(
    data: web::Json<LoginData>,
    _state: web::Data<AppState>,
) -> impl Responder {
    record_span("auth.login", &format!("user:{}", data.email)).await;

    if data.email.contains("@") && data.senha.len() >= 6 {
        let html = r#"
        <div class="p-6 bg-green-100 rounded">
          <h2 class="text-xl font-semibold mb-4">Login bem-sucedido!</h2>
          <a href="/dashboard" class="text-blue-600 hover:underline">Ir para o dashboard</a>
        </div>
        "#;
        HttpResponse::Ok().content_type("text/html").body(html)
    } else {
        let html = r#"
        <div class="p-6 bg-red-100 rounded">
          <h2 class="text-xl font-semibold mb-4 text-red-700">Credenciais inválidas</h2>
          <a href="/login" class="text-blue-600 hover:underline">Tentar novamente</a>
        </div>
        "#;
        HttpResponse::Ok().content_type("text/html").body(html)
    }
}

#[get("/api/contracts/list")]
pub async fn contracts_list(state: web::Data<AppState>) -> impl Responder {
    let pool = state.db.lock().await;
    let rows = sqlx::query!("SELECT id, title, status FROM contracts")
        .fetch_all(&*pool)
        .await
        .unwrap_or_else(|_| vec![]);

    let mut html = String::new();
    html.push_str(r#"<table class="min-w-full bg-gray-50 shadow overflow-hidden rounded-lg">"#);
    html.push_str(r#"<thead><tr><th class="px-4 py-2 border-b">ID</th><th class="px-4 py-2 border-b">Título</th><th class="px-4 py-2 border-b">Status</th></tr></thead><tbody>"#);
    for row in rows {
        html.push_str(&format!(
            r#"<tr><td class="px-4 py-2 border-b">{}</td><td class="px-4 py-2 border-b">{}</td><td class="px-4 py-2 border-b">{}</td></tr>"#,
            row.id, row.title, row.status
        ));
    }
    html.push_str("</tbody></table>");
    HttpResponse::Ok().content_type("text/html").body(html)
}

#[derive(Deserialize)]
pub struct LlmRequest {
    pub prompt: String,
}

#[post("/api/llm/summary")]
pub async fn llm_summary(req: web::Json<LlmRequest>) -> impl Responder {
    let summary = logline_runner::run_llm_gateway(&req.prompt).await.unwrap_or_else(|e| e);
    HttpResponse::Ok().json(serde_json::json!({ "summary": summary }))
}
```

### 4.4. `backend/src/logline_runner.rs`

```rust
use tokio::process::Command;
use crate::utils::record_span;

pub async fn run_llm_gateway(prompt: &str) -> Result<String, String> {
    let output = Command::new("echo").arg("LLM response").output().await.map_err(|e| e.to_string())?;
    let resp = String::from_utf8_lossy(&output.stdout).into_owned();
    record_span("llm.route", &resp).await;
    Ok(resp)
}
```

### 4.5. `backend/src/utils.rs`

```rust
use chrono::Utc;

// Grava spans em JSONL (simplificado: imprime no console)
pub async fn record_span(span_type: &str, message: &str) {
    let timestamp = Utc::now().to_rfc3339();
    let span = format!(r#"{{"timestamp":"{}","type":"{}","message":"{}"}}"#, timestamp, span_type, message);
    println!("{}", span);
}
```

5\. `infra/`
------------

### 5.1. `infra/Dockerfile`

```dockerfile
# Frontend WASM build
FROM rust:1.70 as builder-frontend
WORKDIR /app/frontend
COPY ./frontend/Cargo.toml .
COPY ./frontend/src ./src
COPY ./frontend/static ./static
RUN cargo install wasm-pack && \
    wasm-pack build --release --target web --out-dir static

# Backend Rust build
FROM rust:1.70 as builder-backend
WORKDIR /app
COPY ./backend/Cargo.toml ./backend/Cargo.lock ./backend/src ./backend/src
RUN cd backend && cargo build --release

# Final image
FROM debian:bookworm-slim
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=builder-backend /app/backend/target/release/minicontratos_backend /usr/local/bin/minicontratos_backend
COPY --from=builder-frontend /app/frontend/static /app/static
COPY ./contracts /app/contracts
EXPOSE 8080
CMD ["/usr/local/bin/minicontratos_backend"]
```

```yaml
apiVersion: apps/v1

  replicas: 2

          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
          env:

              valueFrom:

                  key: api_key
---

kind: Service
metadata:
  name: minicontratos-svc
spec:
  selector:
    app: minicontratos
  ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 80
      targetPort: 8080
  type: ClusterIP
```

2.  Copie/cole o conteúdo de cada arquivo conforme listado acima.


    ```bash
    cargo run
    ```

6.  Navegue para `/login`, teste o formulário de login, depois para `/dashboard`.
    
7.  No console do terminal, você verá spans de auditoria sendo impressos (por exemplo, `auth.login`, `llm.route`, etc.).

### 2\. Frontend (WASM)

#### 2.1. `frontend/Cargo.toml`

```toml
[package]
name = "logline_wasm"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"

[lib]
crate-type = ["cdylib"]

[dependencies]
wasm-bindgen = "0.2"
serde = { version = "1.0", features = ["derive"] }
serde_yaml = "0.9"
js-sys = "0.3"
web-sys = { version = "0.3", features = ["Document", "Element", "Console"] }
console_error_panic_hook = "0.1"
```

#### 2.2. `frontend/src/lib.rs`

```rust
use wasm_bindgen::prelude::*;
use web_sys::{Document, Element};
use serde::Deserialize;
use serde_yaml::Value as YamlValue;
use std::collections::BTreeMap;

#[derive(Deserialize)]
struct Span {
    #[serde(rename = "type")]
    span_type: String,
    blocks: Option<Vec<Block>>,
}

#[derive(Deserialize)]
struct Block {
    component: String,
    #[serde(default)]
    props: BTreeMap<String, YamlValue>,
}

#[wasm_bindgen(start)]
pub fn main() {
    console_error_panic_hook::set_once();
}

#[wasm_bindgen]
pub fn render_contract(yaml_str: &str) -> Result<(), JsValue> {
    let spans: Vec<Span> = serde_yaml::from_str(yaml_str)
        .map_err(|e| JsValue::from_str(&format!("YAML parse error: {}", e)))?;
    let window = web_sys::window().unwrap();
    let document: Document = window.document().unwrap();
    let app_div: Element = document.get_element_by_id("app")
        .ok_or_else(|| JsValue::from_str("Elemento #app não encontrado"))?;
    app_div.set_inner_html("");

    for span in spans {
        if span.span_type == "ui.render" {
            if let Some(blocks) = span.blocks {
                for block in blocks {
                    let el = document.create_element(&block.component)
                        .map_err(|_| JsValue::from_str("Falha ao criar elemento"))?;
                    for (k, v) in &block.props {
                        if k == "class" {
                            if let Some(s) = v.as_str() {
                                el.set_attribute("class", s)?;
                            }
                        } else if k == "text" {
                            if let Some(s) = v.as_str() {
                                el.set_text_content(Some(s));
                            }
                        } else if k == "action" {
                            if let Some(path) = v.as_str() {
                                let target = path.to_string();
                                let closure = Closure::wrap(Box::new(move || {
                                    web_sys::window().unwrap()
                                        .location().set_href(&target).unwrap();
                                }) as Box<dyn FnMut()>);
                                el.add_event_listener_with_callback("click", closure.as_ref().unchecked_ref())?;
                                closure.forget();
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    app_div.append_child(&el)?;
                }
            }
        }
    }
    Ok(())
}
```

#### 2.5. `frontend/static/wasm_glue.js`

```js
import init, { render_contract } from "./logline_wasm.js";

async function loadAndRender(path) {
  await init();
  try {
    const r = await fetch(path);
    const txt = await r.text();
    render_contract(txt);
  } catch (e) {
    document.getElementById("app").innerHTML = `<p class="text-gray-500">Erro: ${e}</p>`;
    console.error(e);
  }
}

window.addEventListener("load", () => {
  loadAndRender("/contracts/ui/splash.logline");
});
```

#### 2.6. `frontend/build.sh`

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -e

cd frontend
wasm-pack build --release --target web --out-dir static
cd ..
echo "WASM compilado em frontend/static/"
```

### 3\. Backend (Rust Simples)

#### 3.1. `backend/Cargo.toml`

```toml
[package]
name = "minicontratos_backend"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"

[dependencies]
actix-web = "4"
actix-files = "0.6"
serde = { version = "1.0", features = ["derive"] }
tokio = { version = "1", features = ["rt-multi-thread", "macros"] }
```

#### 3.2. `backend/src/main.rs`

```rust
use actix_files::Files;
use actix_web::{get, web, App, HttpResponse, HttpServer, Responder};

#[get("/login")]
async fn login_page() -> impl Responder {
    // Reusa a mesma index.html: WASM tentará carregar /contracts/ui/login.logline
    HttpResponse::Ok()
        .content_type("text/html")
        .body(include_str!("../../frontend/static/index.html"))
}

#[get("/")]
async fn splash_page() -> impl Responder {
    // Sempre servir index.html; WASM carrega o splash.logline
    HttpResponse::Ok()
        .content_type("text/html")
        .body(include_str!("../../frontend/static/index.html"))
}

#[actix_web::main]
async fn main() -> std::io::Result<()> {
    HttpServer::new(move || {
        App::new()
            // Serve arquivos estáticos (WASM, CSS, JS)
            .service(Files::new("/static", "./frontend/static"))
            // Serve contratos YAML
            .service(Files::new("/contracts/ui", "./contracts/ui"))
            // Rotas principais
            .service(splash_page)
            .service(login_page)
    })
    .bind(("127.0.0.1", 8080))?
    .run()
    .await
}
```

#### 3.3. `backend/src/utils.rs`

```rust
// (Opcional) helpers para gravação de spans, logs, etc.
// Por ora, deixamos vazio.
```

> **Nota:** Neste scaffold mínimo, o backend simplesmente serve o HTML estático e os arquivos `.logline`. Na prática, você estenderá com handlers `/api/auth/login`, `/api/contracts/list`, etc.

### 4\. Infra (Docker)

#### 4.1. `infra/Dockerfile`

```dockerfile
# 1) Compilar Frontend WASM
FROM rust:1.70 as builder-frontend
WORKDIR /app/frontend
COPY ./frontend/Cargo.toml .
COPY ./frontend/src ./src
COPY ./frontend/static ./static
RUN cargo install wasm-pack && \
    wasm-pack build --release --target web --out-dir static

# 2) Compilar Backend Rust
FROM rust:1.70 as builder-backend
WORKDIR /app
COPY ./backend/Cargo.toml ./backend/Cargo.lock ./backend/src ./backend/src
RUN cd backend && cargo build --release

# 3) Imagem final leve
FROM debian:bookworm-slim
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=builder-backend /app/backend/target/release/minicontratos_backend /usr/local/bin/minicontratos_backend
COPY --from=builder-frontend /app/frontend/static /app/static
COPY ./contracts /app/contracts
EXPOSE 8080
CMD ["/usr/local/bin/minicontratos_backend"]
```

* * *

Instruções de Uso
-----------------

1.  **Criar pastas e arquivos** conforme listado acima.
    
2.  **Compilar o frontend WASM**:
    
    ```bash
    cd minicontratos-2030/frontend
    bash build.sh
    ```
    
    Isso gera `frontend/static/logline_wasm_bg.wasm` e `logline_wasm.js`.
    
3.  **Rodar o backend**:
    
    ```bash
    cd minicontratos-2030
    cd backend
    cargo run
    ```
    
    O servidor escuta em `http://localhost:8080`.
    
4.  **Abrir no navegador**:
    
    *   Acesse `http://localhost:8080` → o WASM vai buscar `splash.logline` e renderizar a UI.
        
    *   Se clicar em “Entrar”, ele navegará para `/login`, onde você precisaria criar um `login.logline` (não incluído neste scaffold extremamente enxuto).
        

* * *

Dessa forma, você tem apenas as **peças mínimas necessárias** para validar o conceito “tudo em LogLine + WASM + Rust”. Conforme for avançando, basta adicionar novos contratos `.logline` em `contracts/ui/`, handlers em `backend/src/` e expandir o CSS em `frontend/static/style.css`.

Se ainda faltar algo ou quiser que eu reenvie algum arquivo específico que expirou, me avise!

## Prompt:
Pensei durante 5 segundos

A ler documentos

O utilizador menciona que a estrutura era muito pequena para aplicações profissionais que exigem milhares de arquiteturas. Parece que ele procura uma estrutura mais robusta e adequada para essas aplicações. Além disso, refere que alguns ficheiros enviados anteriormente expiraram. O sistema me instrui a informar o utilizador sobre a expiração desses ficheiros e solicitar que os reenvie caso queira carregá-los novamente.

Feito

Entendido. O scaffold mínimo que enviei era apenas um ponto de partida para provar o conceito “LogLine → WASM no navegador + Rust no servidor”. Para aplicações profissionais de grande escala—com testes automatizados, CI/CD, processos de linting, monitoramento, multi-tenant, etc.—é preciso um scaffold muito mais completo. A seguir, proponho uma estrutura “industrial” capaz de suportar equipes, entrega contínua e múltiplos ambientes.

* * *

Scaffold Profissional Completo para “Minicontratos 2030”
========================================================

Visão Geral
-----------

Este scaffold deve servir de base para:

1.  **Múltiplos microsserviços** (frontend WASM, backend Rust, workers de LLM, serviços de infra).
    
2.  **Pipelines de CI/CD** (build, testes, lint, deploy).
    
3.  **Testes automatizados** (unit, integração e end-to-end).
    
4.  **Monitoramento**, **logs estruturados** e **telemetria OpenTelemetry**.
    
5.  **Gerenciamento de configurações** por ambiente (dev/staging/prod).
    
6.  **Arquitetura multi-tenant** (isolar dados por tenant).
    
7.  **Provisionamento de infra** sem YAML manual (span-driven infra).
    
8.  **Documentação vivo** (gerada a partir de comentários nos contratos `.logline`).
    

Vou ilustrar aqui a estrutura de pastas e o conteúdo de cada parte essencial. É grande, mas cobre quase tudo que se espera num projeto profissional.

* * *

Estrutura Completa
------------------

```
minicontratos-2030/
├── contracts/                    # Todos os “contratos” LogLine, divididos por domínio
│   ├── ui/                       # UI declarativa
│   │   ├── splash.logline
│   │   ├── login.logline
│   │   ├── dashboard.logline
│   │   └── ...                   # outros painéis (perfil, configurações, etc.)
│   ├── llm/                      # Spans LLM (plan, summarize, classify etc.)
│   │   ├── summary.logline
│   │   ├── plan_business.logline
│   │   └── ...                   # outros operadores llm:*
│   ├── infra/                    # Spans que provisionam infra (K8s, infra.monitoring)
│   │   ├── k8s_deploy.logline
│   │   ├── autoscale.logline
│   │   └── monitoring_setup.logline
│   ├── db/                       # Spans de DB (queries, migrations, RLS)
│   │   ├── query_contracts.logline
│   │   ├── migrate_users.logline
│   │   └── rls_tenants.logline
│   ├── auth/                     # Spans de autenticação/autorização
│   │   ├── login_flow.logline
│   │   ├── refresh_token.logline
│   │   └── revoke_token.logline
│   ├── messaging/                # Spans para integrar canais (WhatsApp, Email)
│   │   ├── whatsapp_flow.logline
│   │   ├── email_send.logline
│   │   └── slack_notify.logline
│   └── workflows/                # Flujos maiores orquestrando spans de vários domínios
│       ├── onboarding_user.logline
│       ├── billing_cycle.logline
│       └── refund_process.logline
│
```
